findings.description: Legacy NSURLConnection authentication delegate found
findings.impact: NSURLConnection is deprecated; legacy delegates may lack modern security
findings.recommendation: Migrate to URLSession with proper delegate implementation

findings.issue_type: No Certificate Pinning in TLS Delegate
findings.description: TLS delegate does not perform certificate pinning
findings.impact: Without pinning, a CA-issued rogue certificate could be accepted
findings.recommendation: Consider implementing certificate pinning for sensitive connections

findings.description: TLS delegate unconditionally accepts all certificates without any conditional checks
findings.impact: All TLS certificates are accepted without validation - trivial MitM
findings.recommendation: Implement proper SecTrustEvaluateWithError and check result

findings.issue_type: No Certificate Pinning in TLS Delegate
findings.description: TLS delegate does not perform certificate pinning

findings.recommendation: Consider implementing certificate pinning for sensitive connections

findings.description: TLS delegate has conditional logic but no trust evaluation - bypass may be reachable
findings.impact: Certificate validation bypass may be reachable under certain conditions
findings.recommendation: Review the conditional logic; implement proper SecTrustEvaluateWithError

findings.description: Using deprecated SecTrustEvaluate API

findings.recommendation: Use SecTrustEvaluateWithError (iOS 12+) for better error handling
